title: pfaffia helichrysoides
intro: Pfaffia helichrysoides, also known as suma root or Brazilian ginseng, is a plant native to South America, particularly in the Amazon rainforest, that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Pfaffia helichrysoides are attributed to its adaptogenic and antioxidant properties, which help to reduce stress and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of using Pfaffia helichrysoides include improving immune function, reducing anxiety and fatigue, and promoting overall well-being. Pfaffia helichrysoides can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
